steps.action: Sign up the isolated user, complete onboarding, and create a prerequisite project.
steps.expected: A dashboard user with at least one project can access the new interview form.
steps.observed: Created user ff-dashboard-forms-user-20260315@example.com, completed onboarding, created project 'Dashboard Validation Project', and loaded /dashboard/interviews?new=true.

steps.action: Open /dashboard/interviews?new=true and submit the empty form.
steps.expected: Field-specific inline errors appear for project, title, and transcript.
steps.observed: Inline errors displayed: 'Please select a project', 'Title must be at least 3 characters', and 'Transcript must be at least 50 characters'.

steps.action: Inspect captured network activity after the invalid submission.
steps.expected: No create request is sent for the invalid form.
steps.observed: Request log showed repeated GET /api/interviews fetches from page load only; no POST /api/interviews request was captured after submit.

evidence.consoleErrors: none after log reset; only Vite connection/debug and React DevTools info messages were present
evidence.network: GET /api/interviews on page load only; no POST /api/interviews after invalid submit

steps.action: Open /dashboard/specs?new=true with the isolated user and existing project.
steps.expected: The new spec form is available for validation.
steps.observed: Loaded the Feature Specs page with the new spec form open.

steps.expected: Field-specific inline errors appear for project, title, and description.
steps.observed: Inline errors displayed: 'Please select a project', 'Title must be at least 3 characters', and 'Description must be at least 20 characters'.

steps.action: Inspect captured network activity after the invalid submission.
steps.expected: No create request is sent for the invalid form.
steps.observed: Request log showed repeated GET /api/specs fetches from page load only; no POST /api/specs request was captured after submit.

evidence.consoleErrors: none after log reset; only Vite connection/debug and React DevTools info messages were present
evidence.network: GET /api/specs on page load only; no POST /api/specs after invalid submit

summary: Tested 2 dashboard form assertions through the real browser UI. Both passed: interview and spec forms showed field-specific inline validation errors and blocked invalid create requests.
